package rulecoverage

func NegativeBusinessValidationMixedWithPersistenceCallsInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "business_validation_mixed_with_persistence_calls_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that start querying or writing before finishing request validation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
